name: DonutChart
searchText: donutchart donut chart component @mantine/charts /charts/donut-chart cellprops chartlabel children data endangle labelcolor labelstype paddingangle piechartprops pieprops size startangle strokecolor strokewidth thickness tooltipanimationduration tooltipdatasource tooltipprops valueformatter withlabels withlabelsline withtooltip

props.name: cellProps
props.description: Props passed down to each segment of the chart

props.name: chartLabel
props.description: Chart label, displayed in the center of the chart

props.name: children
props.description: Additional elements rendered inside PieChart component

props.name: data
props.description: Data used to render chart

props.name: endAngle
props.description: Controls angle at which charts ends. Set to 0 to render the chart as semicircle.

props.name: labelColor
props.description: Controls text color of all labels, by default depends on color scheme

props.name: labelsType
props.description: Type of labels to display, 'value' by default

props.name: paddingAngle
props.description: Controls padding between segments

props.name: pieChartProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts PieChart component

props.name: pieProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts Pie component

props.name: size
props.description: Controls chart width and height, height is increased by 40 if withLabels prop is set. Cannot be less than thickness.

props.name: startAngle
props.description: Controls angle at which chart starts. Set to 180 to render the chart as semicircle.

props.name: strokeColor
props.description: Controls color of the segments stroke, by default depends on color scheme

props.name: strokeWidth
props.description: Controls width of segments stroke

props.name: thickness
props.description: Controls thickness of the chart segments

props.name: tooltipAnimationDuration
props.description: Tooltip animation duration in ms

props.name: tooltipDataSource
props.description: Determines which data is displayed in the tooltip. 'all' – display all values, 'segment' – display only hovered segment.

props.name: tooltipProps
props.description: Props passed down to Tooltip recharts component

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: A function to format values inside the tooltip

props.name: withLabels
props.description: Determines whether each segment should have associated label

props.name: withLabelsLine
props.description: Determines whether segments labels should have lines that connect the segment with the label

props.name: withTooltip
props.description: Determines whether the tooltip should be displayed when one of the section is hovered
